englishDefinitions: Burners on a stove that are humorously or descriptively compared to spiders, often because of their shape or arrangement.
A phrase that may refer to unusual stove burners in a specific scene, joke, or conversation.
persianTranslation: مشعل‌های اجاق که شبیه عنکبوت به نظر می‌رسند
examples: The old stove had strange spider burners that looked hard to clean.
He joked that the spider burners made the kitchen look scary.
In that scene, the character points at the spider burners on the stove.
